title: Trump camp wastes no time attacking Tim Walz's military service
shortDescription: Democratic vice presidential nominee Tim Walz's National Guard service has become an immediate target of Republican Donald Trump's campaign

title: Picture of Hitler raising fist altered to resemble Trump | Fact check
shortDescription: Aspects of a photo taken of Hitler were digitally combined with artificial elements, including the people standing on either side of him.

title: Presidential election odds: Kamala Harris' VP pick narrows Trump lead
shortDescription: The ticket's barnstorm through swing states this week could further narrow the odds heading into the Democratic National Convention in less than two weeks.

title: What did Walz do in Congress? How he staked out the middle before shifting left
shortDescription: Walz spent years in the House as a moderate before pushing progressive policy as governor.

title: Viral photo of Trump and Black women is AI-generated | Fact check
shortDescription: The creator of the picture confirmed it is AI-generated, and an expert in AI pointed out telltale clues that show that as well.

title: 'I want to debate her': Trump predicts debate with Harris will happen
shortDescription: 'We’ll be debating her,' Trump says of Kamala Harris on Fox News Wednesday.

title: Behind Gov. Josh Shapiro's doomed VP bid: War in Gaza and other baggage
shortDescription: War in Gaza, other baggage doomed Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro's campaign to become Democratic presidential nominee Kamala Harris's running mate.

title: Harris and Walz electrify Democrats in Philadelphia in campaign debut
shortDescription: No scene captured the drastic shift in the 2024 race as vividly as Harris' rally in Philadelphia Tuesday night debuting her VP nominee Tim Walz.
